message:
test: Add xxhash correctness tests with spec reference vectors

26 tests split into structural (12) and correctness (14) categories:
- Structural tests pass with polyfill: import, streaming, copy, seed
  differentiation, one-shot/streaming equivalence, determinism
- Correctness tests require native Zig module: exact XXH32/XXH64/XXH3
  values from xxhash spec, proper digest sizes (4/8/16 bytes),
  algorithm names, seed properties, intdigest/hexdigest consistency

Documents polyfill deficiencies: wrong hash values, all variants
return 8-byte digests, broken seed storage, name always "xxhash".
